## Meeting Purpose

[Prepare Marcel Santilli for his speaking engagement at the Marketing Academy US Alumni Day in NYC.](https://fathom.video/share/LBUeJsvcUhYVJEekUu9KQE8MNLCygo8o?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel will deliver a 60-minute session on personal reinvention and becoming AI-native](https://fathom.video/share/LBUeJsvcUhYVJEekUu9KQE8MNLCygo8o?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Format: 30-min keynote on Marcel's journey, followed by 30-min fireside chat/Q\&A](https://fathom.video/share/LBUeJsvcUhYVJEekUu9KQE8MNLCygo8o?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Key themes: Overcoming career setbacks, leveraging AI for personal growth, and the urgency of reinvention for knowledge workers](https://fathom.video/share/LBUeJsvcUhYVJEekUu9KQE8MNLCygo8o?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [Session will blend personal storytelling with practical AI demonstrations](https://fathom.video/share/LBUeJsvcUhYVJEekUu9KQE8MNLCygo8o?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)

## Topics

### Marcel's Background and GrowthX

  - [Started at IBM, built content hubs for major brands](https://fathom.video/share/LBUeJsvcUhYVJEekUu9KQE8MNLCygo8o?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [Transitioned to startups (HashiCorp, Scale.ai, DeepGram)](https://fathom.video/share/LBUeJsvcUhYVJEekUu9KQE8MNLCygo8o?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [Founded GrowthX, applying AI workflows to marketing](https://fathom.video/share/LBUeJsvcUhYVJEekUu9KQE8MNLCygo8o?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [Rapid growth: $11M revenue, Series A funding](https://fathom.video/share/LBUeJsvcUhYVJEekUu9KQE8MNLCygo8o?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
  - [Working with brands like Lovable, Ramp, Reddit, Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/LBUeJsvcUhYVJEekUu9KQE8MNLCygo8o?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)

### Session Structure and Content

  - [First 30 minutes: Marcel's personal journey and lessons learned](https://fathom.video/share/LBUeJsvcUhYVJEekUu9KQE8MNLCygo8o?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)
      - [Career setbacks (layoffs, equity clawbacks)](https://fathom.video/share/LBUeJsvcUhYVJEekUu9KQE8MNLCygo8o?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)
      - [Strategies for reinvention (delegating tasks, building leverage)](https://fathom.video/share/LBUeJsvcUhYVJEekUu9KQE8MNLCygo8o?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
      - [Becoming AI-native and building AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/LBUeJsvcUhYVJEekUu9KQE8MNLCygo8o?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)
  - [Second 30 minutes: Fireside chat and audience Q\&A](https://fathom.video/share/LBUeJsvcUhYVJEekUu9KQE8MNLCygo8o?tab=summary&timestamp=1600.0)
      - [Moderated by Candy (Marketing Academy)](https://fathom.video/share/LBUeJsvcUhYVJEekUu9KQE8MNLCygo8o?tab=summary&timestamp=1711.0)
      - [Focus on practical applications and audience engagement](https://fathom.video/share/LBUeJsvcUhYVJEekUu9KQE8MNLCygo8o?tab=summary&timestamp=1905.0)

### Key Messages for Attendees

  - [Urgency of reinvention for knowledge workers in the AI era](https://fathom.video/share/LBUeJsvcUhYVJEekUu9KQE8MNLCygo8o?tab=summary&timestamp=1439.0)
  - [Importance of building "AI muscles" and thinking from first principles](https://fathom.video/share/LBUeJsvcUhYVJEekUu9KQE8MNLCygo8o?tab=summary&timestamp=1551.0)
  - [Balancing vulnerability and expertise in leadership](https://fathom.video/share/LBUeJsvcUhYVJEekUu9KQE8MNLCygo8o?tab=summary&timestamp=1703.0)
  - [Practical steps for leveraging AI in marketing and personal growth](https://fathom.video/share/LBUeJsvcUhYVJEekUu9KQE8MNLCygo8o?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)

### Alignment with Marketing Academy Values

  - [Emphasis on personal growth and leadership development](https://fathom.video/share/LBUeJsvcUhYVJEekUu9KQE8MNLCygo8o?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
  - [Vulnerability and authentic storytelling](https://fathom.video/share/LBUeJsvcUhYVJEekUu9KQE8MNLCygo8o?tab=summary&timestamp=1694.0)
  - [Practical, actionable insights for attendees](https://fathom.video/share/LBUeJsvcUhYVJEekUu9KQE8MNLCygo8o?tab=summary&timestamp=1600.0)
  - [Connection to the "Art of Leadership" theme (held at Whitney Museum)](https://fathom.video/share/LBUeJsvcUhYVJEekUu9KQE8MNLCygo8o?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel's team to share sample recordings of similar talks](https://fathom.video/share/LBUeJsvcUhYVJEekUu9KQE8MNLCygo8o?tab=summary&timestamp=1782.0)
  - [Confirm logistical details (exact time slot, tech requirements)](https://fathom.video/share/LBUeJsvcUhYVJEekUu9KQE8MNLCygo8o?tab=summary&timestamp=1937.0)
  - [Marketing Academy to provide any specific questions for the fireside chat portion](https://fathom.video/share/LBUeJsvcUhYVJEekUu9KQE8MNLCygo8o?tab=summary&timestamp=1711.0)
  - [Marcel to prepare keynote and demo materials](https://fathom.video/share/LBUeJsvcUhYVJEekUu9KQE8MNLCygo8o?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Follow-up email to address any remaining questions from both sides](https://fathom.video/share/LBUeJsvcUhYVJEekUu9KQE8MNLCygo8o?tab=summary&timestamp=1941.0)
